objective: Define the non-secret evidence required to close every public launch, PWA, native app, store submission, cloud, privacy, review, and China distribution blocker.
rules: Do not store real passwords, API keys, signing keys, private certificates, session cookies, private customer assets, or unredacted production logs in this repository.
Evidence in the repository must be sanitized, repeatable, and linked to a command, source file, or external checklist reference.
A release blocker can be closed only when its evidence bundle has current evidence for every required item and the listed verification commands pass against the intended environment.
Secrets should be represented by password-manager, hosting-secret, keychain, CI-secret, or store-console references only.
Console screenshots are allowed only when they are redacted and do not show account, billing, private user, credential, or signing material.

evidenceStorage.repositoryPolicy: Store only sanitized evidence summaries, redacted screenshots, checklist notes, and command-result references.
externalPrivateStorage: release password manager for review passwords and signing secret references
App Store Connect and Google Play Console
Apple Developer account and Google Play Console signing areas
private incident/operations checklist for unredacted logs

currentEvidence: Public origin is recorded as https://www.zkraiflow.top.
store/evidence/public-domain-smoke-2026-06-10.json records npm run public:check with 30 passes, 0 blockers, and 2 owner-input warnings.
public:check and pwa:public-smoke verify public pages, manifest, legal/support pages, and health endpoints.
store/evidence/pwa-public-smoke-2026-06-10.json records npm run pwa:public-smoke with 31 passes, 0 blockers, and 0 warnings.
Authenticated smoke evidence template defines sanitized proof required after the review account exists.
Production auth/CORS handoff exists.
acceptableEvidence: npm run production:smoke-template passes before authenticated smoke evidence is collected.
PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN is set to https://www.zkraiflow.top in the production runtime.
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS is pinned to the public origin plus required Capacitor origins.
CONSOLE_AUTH_COOKIE_SECURE=true is verified on HTTPS.
Authenticated cloud smoke passes with the review-safe account.
Health endpoint returns ready without exposing secrets.
missingEvidence: Filled authenticated smoke evidence JSON with redacted cookie/CORS/session proof.
Authenticated cloud smoke against https://www.zkraiflow.top with a review-safe account.
Production cookie/CORS runtime proof from the hosting environment.

currentEvidence: Pilot readiness runbook exists for https://www.zkraiflow.top.
Pilot invite pack exists and states the pilot is not a public launch.
PWA device install evidence template defines Android/iOS install and offline proof requirements.
Pilot readiness check is wired into release:check.
Pilot scope explicitly blocks public launch and store submission.
acceptableEvidence: npm run pilot:invite-pack passes before testers are invited.
npm run pwa:device-template passes before PWA device evidence is collected.
Tester invite text, safety notice, success metrics, and stop rules are sent to the pilot owner.
npm run pilot:readiness passes before inviting testers.
Pilot audience, date range, support owner, and rollback owner are confirmed.
PWA device install evidence is captured before using PWA as the main pilot channel.
Real generation remains dry-run only until storage and worker evidence are complete.
missingEvidence: Filled PWA device install evidence records.
Authenticated pilot smoke with review-safe account.
doNotStore: store console screenshots with account details

Feedback issues are triaged into blocker, planned, fixed, or closed states.
missingEvidence: External support SLA for public launch.
Formal helpdesk or database migration for scaled support.

closeoutSequence: Fill owner inputs and secret references outside the repository.
Run the relevant domain check for the evidence bundle.
Run npm run pilot:readiness before inviting internal or friendly testers.
Add sanitized evidence notes or redacted screenshots under store/evidence/ only when needed.
Run npm run release:check before changing blocker status.
Update blocker status only after evidence is complete and commands pass against the intended environment.
